work_unit: COGALPHA-04: silent MockLlmClient fallback → fail-fast on DeepSeek misconfiguration
situation: audit-2026-07-07-028 finding COGALPHA-04 (medium, direction-shift): get_llm_client_named silently falls back to MockLlmClient when DeepSeek API key is missing/invalid. Production misconfiguration would be masked, causing deterministic mock factor expressions to pollute live trading decisions.
action: Changed get_llm_client_named signature from Arc<dyn LlmClient> to Result<Arc<dyn LlmClient>, LlmError>. Removed internal silent fallback. get_llm_client now panics with tracing::error on construction failure (fail-fast). Re-exported get_llm_client_named + LlmError from lib.rs. Added test get_llm_client_named_deepseek_errors_without_key. All 8 tests pass.
outcome_evidence: Commit 65d3e12 on auto/opt-cogalpha-1783357989 pushed to origin (e5339c0..65d3e12). cargo test -p moni-cogalpha --lib llm: 8/8 passed including new get_llm_client_named_deepseek_errors_without_key. Used case-104 escape hatch (cp-guard triggered due to prior COGALPHA-03 unmerged changes in same worktree).
next_suggestion: 派生 MC-003 fix (config read TOCTOU between canonicalize and read_to_string, config.rs:506, low direction-shift)
派生 MC-004 fix (no upper-bound sanity checks on fees/ratios in config validation, config.rs:373, low direction-shift)
